<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kahashukuneno Shrine (Gyokoda, Shibukawa City) | native_name = 甲波宿禰神社（渋川市行幸田） | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kahashukuneno Shrine (Gyokoda, Shibukawa City) | coordinates = {{coord|36.47809|138.995428}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kahashukuneno Shrine (Gyokoda, Shibukawa City)'''|甲波宿禰神社（渋川市行幸田）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kōzuke Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kahashukuneno Shrine (Gyokoda, Shibukawa City)'''|甲波宿禰神社（渋川市行幸田）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kōzuke Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kahashukuneno Shrine (Gyokoda, Shibukawa City)'''|甲波宿禰神社（渋川市行幸田）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kōzuke Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Kahashukuneno Shrine (Gyokoda, Shibukawa City) | native_name = 甲波宿禰神社（渋川市行幸田） | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Kahashukuneno Shrine (Gyokoda, Shibukawa City) | coordinates = {{coord|36.47809|138.995428}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Kahashukuneno Shrine (Gyokoda, Shibukawa City)'''|甲波宿禰神社（渋川市行幸田）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Kōzuke Province]].
